arabic_text:
دور کشف
کشف
قائم
قائم کشف
6 قوائم
برزخ عاشر
english_text:
Cycle of Revelation
Revelation (Kashf)
Qa'im (Upholder)
Qa'im of Revelation
Six Qa'ims
Tenth Barzakh
1,24,000 (124,000)
50,000
alt_text: An elaborate staircase-and-pyramid composite diagram. Six descending yellow tablets numbered 1-6 each pair 'کشف' (Revelation) and 'قائم' (Qa'im) — incrementing through 7000/14000/21000/28000/35000/42000 — building toward 124,000 (1,24,000) per stage. On the right, a smaller breakout shows '7' = 4000 + 3000 with 'قائم کشف' (Qa'im of Revelation), totalling 7000. Bottom-right brings the chain together into a hexagonal '7' tablet labeled '50,000' under '6 قوائم' (Six Qa'ims) and 'برزخ عاشر' (Tenth Barzakh).
notes: Most elaborate diagram in this chapter. Builds out the 50,000-year cycle from images 009/010 into the broader 124,000-year cosmic ledger across six Qa'ims, terminating in the Tenth Barzakh. The 1+2+4+0+0+0=7 / 7+0+0+0=7000 numerology of image 007 echoes here in the place-value math at top-left.
